page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 8 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of RAM, which equates to 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the processor delivers weak single-core and multi-core performance in stress-ng and Geekbench tests, placing in the bottom 25%. However, Passmark CPU and extended instruction tests show average performance in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth for large blocks is average, whereas small-block cached read bandwidth is weak. Cryptographic and compression tasks show mixed results, with single-threaded gzip compression performing in the bottom 10%, while Redis SET operations and small-model LLM inference achieve average throughput.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5ne.2xlarge offers a balanced resource density of 4 GB RAM per vCPU without the added cost of bundled local storage or GPU accelerators. The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which may impact I/O-heavy workloads. Given its moderate processing capabilities and average memory bandwidth, this server is suited for general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, Redis caching, and lightweight background processing tasks that do not demand high single-thread performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs clocked at 2.5 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps but does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core and multi-core processing capabilities, falling into the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests, though it achieves average results in Passmark CPU tests and Redis SET operations. Large-block memory bandwidth is average, while small-block cached reads are weak. Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and lack of local storage, the ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is qualitatively cost-effective for workloads that rely on network-attached storage. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, moderate database caching, and lightweight web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline. It is suited for moderate caching and general-purpose workloads.

tagline: A dedicated general-purpose server offering a balanced memory-to-core ratio and baseline network performance for standard workloads without local storage.

32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for general-purpose applications and Redis caching
